column1: # Cross-Framework Mapping NIS2 Art. 21.2.c <-> ISO 22301:2019 (+ 22313:2020 guidance)
# Source: ENISA NIS2 Implementation Guidance (2024) on business continuity and crisis management.
# Scope: NIS2 BC/crisis/backup provisions map to ISO 22301 BCMS clauses 4-10 and 8.2/8.4.

column9: Business continuity (backup management, disaster recovery, crisis management) — ISO 22301 Clause 8.2 BIA is the prerequisite analysis.
Business continuity strategies and solutions (Clause 8.3) — NIS2 requires defined strategies.
Business continuity plans and procedures (Clause 8.4) — direct operational deliverable of NIS2 Art.21.2.c.
Incident response structure — NIS2 crisis management hook.
Exercise programme (Clause 8.5) — NIS2 Art.21.2.f effectiveness assessment feeds BCMS testing.
Incident handling lifecycle — ISO 22301 Clause 8.4.2 response structure.
Reporting obligations — ISO 22301 Clause 8.4.3 warning and communication provides the communication plan.
Effectiveness assessment — Clause 9.1 monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation.
Management review (9.3) — reported to management body per NIS2 Art.20.
